g.title: MPM_QSP
g.text: Malignant Pleural Mesothelioma (악성 흉막 중피종) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
Asbestos Fiber Exposure · Frustrated Phagocytosis/HMGB1-NLRP3 Inflammation · BAP1/CDKN2A/NF2-Hippo-YAP Tumor-Suppressor Loss
Chemotherapy (Cisplatin/Pemetrexed/Bevacizumab) · Checkpoint Immunotherapy (Nivolumab/Ipilimumab) · Mesothelin ADC · PARP inhibition (BAP1-deficient) · TTFields · Surgery/Radiation
